summary: The session focused on discussing the use of HRM software to improve employee retention and engagement in the high-tech industry. The user requested open-ended provocative questions to ask prospective customers about their challenges with employee retention, along with clarifying statements based on industry trends.
facts: The user is interested in employee retention challenges in the high-tech industry. The user requested open-ended provocative questions in the style of Jeff Molander for prospective customer conversations. The user seeks to learn about challenges related to employee retention. The user is exploring how HRM software can improve employee engagement and retention. The user is looking for insights into measuring employee engagement and satisfaction. The user is interested in understanding the effectiveness of recruitment and hiring processes in relation to retention strategies. The user is focused on measuring the productivity of the workforce to enhance retention strategies.
